server.privateDesc: People need an invite to join

server.noServersDescription: There are no public servers at the moment. Try refreshing or create your own community!

server.customEmojisDesc: Add custom emoji to personalize your server

server.emojiUploadRecommendation: Recommended: 128×128px. Max: 1 MB. Formats: PNG, GIF, WebP, APNG, SVG, JPEG.
server.deleteServerWarning: Permanently delete this server and all its data
server.deleteServerConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this server? All channels, messages, and data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
server.typeServerName: Type the server name to confirm
server.publicServerDesc: Anyone can discover and join this server
server.privateServerDesc: Only invited members can join this server
server.publicServerBenefit1: Your server will appear in the public server directory
server.publicServerBenefit2: New members can discover and join your community
server.publicServerBenefit3: Increased visibility for your server's content and activities
server.publicServerBenefit4: Server statistics will be visible to potential members
server.consideration1: Anyone can see your server name, description, and member count
server.consideration2: Server icon and basic information will be publicly visible
server.consideration3: Consider reviewing your server rules and moderation settings
server.consideration4: You can change this setting back to private at any time
server.privateServerInfo: Your server is currently private. Only members with an invite link can join. This provides better control over who can access your community.
server.inviteOnlyDesc: Members can only join through invite links created by server moderators
server.publicDirectoryDesc: Anyone can discover and join your server through the public server list
server.buildCommunityDesc: Build your own community from scratch with complete control over channels, settings, and members.
server.browseAndJoin: Browse and join existing servers to connect with like-minded people and engaging discussions.
server.serversAreWhat: Servers are communities where you can chat, share, and collaborate with others. Think of them as your digital hangout spaces!
server.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search terms or browse all communities
server.findingBestServers: Finding the best servers for you
server.cantFindLookingFor: Can't find what you're looking for?
server.deleteServerConfirmText: You are about to permanently delete the server {serverName}. This action cannot be undone.
server.deleteServerConfirmItem1: All channels, messages, and attachments will be permanently deleted

server.deleteServerConfirmItem3: All roles, permissions, and custom emojis will be erased

server.deleteServerConfirmLabel: Type the server name to confirm:

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize how Harmony looks and feels.
appearance.customThemeHelp: Choose an accent color. The app will automatically generate a complete theme based on your choice.

themes.darkDesc: A dark theme that's easier on the eyes.
themes.midnightDesc: An even darker theme for late night usage.
themes.customDesc: Create your own theme with a custom color.

appearance.fontSizeDesc: Adjust the size of text in messages.
appearance.zoomLevelDesc: Change the zoom level of the entire app.
appearance.compactModeDesc: Show more messages at once with reduced spacing.
appearance.floatingVideoDesc: Playing videos float to corner when scrolled away. Works with YouTube and native videos.
appearance.showCustomEmojisInDisplayNamesDesc: When enabled, other users' display names show emoji images. When disabled, emojis and shortcodes are hidden entirely.
appearance.greentextDesc: Render lines starting with > (no space) in green, imageboard-style. `> text` with a space is always a quote regardless of this setting.
